title: Create transformer_blueprint.py — PyTorch Transformer training scaffold
acceptance_criteria: Loads raw windowed sensor data from windowing.py (not feature-engineered data)
Defines a PyTorch Transformer model architecture with multi-head self-attention for time-series classification
Implements training loop with train/validation split, loss tracking, and epoch logging
Evaluates on the test participant and prints accuracy
Script is structured as a reusable scaffold (main function with configurable hyperparameters)
